_comment: Standard terms and boilerplate for every proposal. This text is FIXED and must be appended to each generated proposal VERBATIM. The AI generation must NOT paraphrase, reword, or omit these. Travel/expense and pricing language here is contractual — treat it as non-negotiable boilerplate.
paymentTerms: 50% paid up front, 50% upon delivery of service.
proposalTerms: This proposal expires 30 days from the date of issue.
This proposal is confidential and should only be shared with the intended parties.
Travel and expenses for professional services are billed separately.
taxesAndFees: All fees are exclusive of applicable taxes. The Customer is responsible for all sales, use, value-added, excise, and similar taxes, duties, and governmental charges arising from this engagement, excluding taxes based on the Vendor's net income. Where the Vendor is required to collect such taxes, they will appear as separate line items on the applicable invoice. Any third-party fees, travel, and expenses are billed separately as described in the Proposal Terms.
